## TDD Workflow

> Задачи организованы по TDD: Red -> Green -> Refactor.
> Каждый этап реализации начинается с .feature сценария (Red), затем реализация (Green), затем рефакторинг.

## Phase -1: Infrastructure Prerequisites (опционально)

> Подготовить инфраструктуру ПЕРЕД разработкой.
> Пропустить если фича не требует новых сервисов/БД/конфигов.
> Env vars пометить `[VERIFIED: source]` после проверки через официальную документацию.

- [ ] {Создать/обновить docker-compose сервисы}
- [ ] {Создать .env файл с необходимыми переменными}
- [ ] {Создать/обновить базу данных / миграции}
- [ ] {Настроить secrets / credentials}

## Phase 0: BDD Foundation (Red)

> Создать .feature файл, step definitions, и BDD hooks ПЕРЕД реализацией бизнес-логики.
> Все сценарии должны FAIL (Red) на этом этапе.

- [x] Create context-menu.feature with BDD scenarios -- @feature1 — Status: DONE | Est: 30m

- [x] Create step definitions -- @feature1 — Status: DONE | Est: 30m
  **Done When:**
  - [x] tests/step_definitions/feature_context_menu.ts exists and drives the real postinstall.ts/launch-claude-tui.ps1 code
- [x] Hooks -- Status: DONE | Est: 10m
  **Done When:**
  - [x] No dedicated BDD hook needed — CTXMENU001_07/08 build their own per-scenario temp directory inline (Given step), not a shared hook
- [x] Fixtures -- Status: DONE | Est: 10m
  **Done When:**
  - [x] No dedicated fixture file needed — scenarios construct their own temp paths inline
- [x] Confirm FR-1..5 scenarios were Red before implementation -- Status: DONE | Est: 10m
  **Done When:**
  - [x] CTXMENU001_01..12 were Red before postinstall.ts/launch-claude-tui.ps1 existed, Green after (historical — see audit-reports/context-menu-cross-user-analysis.md)
- [x] Add CTXMENU001_13..17 scenarios (G8 fix — FR-6/FR-7) -- @feature6 @feature7 — Status: DONE | Est: 30m
  **Done When:**
  - [x] context-menu.feature contains CTXMENU001_13..17 tagged @feature6/@feature7 (added in this spec-only pass)

## Phase 2.5: G8 — trust-gate + universal launch logging (Green)

- [x] Add `ensureWorkspaceTrust` (Yolo-gated, atomic `~/.claude.json` temp-file+rename write) and ERROR+exit-code logging to `scripts/launch-claude-tui.ps1`; add a `-NoTui` switch -- @feature6 @feature7 — Status: DONE | Est: 45m
  _Requirements: [FR-6](FR.md#fr-6-context-menu-launch-entries-log-every-invocation), [FR-7](FR.md#fr-7-trust-auto-grant-before-bypass-permissions-launch)_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] `-Yolo` launch on an untrusted dir sets `hasTrustDialogAccepted: true` via atomic write before invoking claude
  - [ ] non-`-Yolo` launch never writes to `~/.claude.json`
  - [ ] every launch path (TUI, NoTui, Yolo, plain) appends start/result/ERROR+exit-code to `~/.dev-pomogator/logs/context-menu-launch.log`
  - [ ] CTXMENU001_13/_14/_15/_16 scenarios pass
- [x] Route raw NSS "Claude Code (YOLO)" / "Claude Code" entries (incl. Admin-submenu mirrors) through `launch-claude-tui.ps1` instead of calling `wt.exe ... claude` directly, in `tools/context-menu/postinstall.ts` `generateNss()` -- @feature6 — Status: DONE | Est: 20m
  _Requirements: [FR-6](FR.md#fr-6-context-menu-launch-entries-log-every-invocation)_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] CTXMENU001_17 scenario passes (NSS entries reference launch-claude-tui.ps1, not bare claude)
  - [ ] existing CTXMENU001_01/_03/_05/_12 scenarios still pass (no regression in entry ordering/content)
- [x] Write step definitions for CTXMENU001_13..17 in `tests/step_definitions/feature_context_menu.ts` driving the real script/function (real pwsh execution for 13-16, real TS import for 17), no mocks -- @feature6 @feature7 — Status: DONE | Est: 40m
  _Requirements: [FR-6](FR.md#fr-6-context-menu-launch-entries-log-every-invocation), [FR-7](FR.md#fr-7-trust-auto-grant-before-bypass-permissions-launch)_
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] all 5 new scenarios FAIL (Red) before implementation, PASS (Green) after
- [ ] Document gap G8 in `audit-reports/context-menu-cross-user-analysis.md` gap register, matching the existing G1-G7 format -- Status: TODO | Est: 15m
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] G8 row added with Severity/Gap/Status columns consistent with G1-G7
- [x] Run the BDD suite in Docker and confirm CTXMENU001_13..17 are GREEN with no regression in CTXMENU001_01..12 -- Status: DONE | Est: 15m
  **Done When:**
  - [ ] `docker-bdd.sh` run shows all context-menu scenarios PASSED
